◎简　　介  

　　Starring: "Legacy" @So You Think You Can Dance S06Julie 'Jules' Urich of Beat Freaks @America's Best Dance Crew S03一位女舞者战胜了野蛮的攻击，证明了她自己在地下hip-hop世界中的地位。A story about a female breakdancer overcoming a brutal attack to claim her place in the world of underground hip-hop.
